_comment: Pixazo model catalog. Each model declares one or more operations (text_to_image, edit_image, ...). Conventions: 'sync' = response carries the image URL directly; 'legacy_poll' = POST returns request_id, status is fetched by POSTing to poll_endpoint with the id; 'polling_url' = POST returns an absolute polling_url that we GET to fetch status (output.media_url[0]).

params.image_input: array of image URLs (for image-conditioned gen)
